name: LevelMark.LevelMarkAttributes
summary: The LevelMarkAttributes class contains the attributes for the level mark.

constructors.name: LevelMark.LevelMarkAttributes()
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the LevelMark.LevelMarkAttributes class that loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: LevelMark.LevelMarkAttributes(String)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the LevelMark.LevelMarkAttributes class that loads the specified attributes.

params.name: AttributesFile
params.doc: The filename of the attributes file.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads the attributes from the attribute file.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The filename of the attribute file.

returns.doc: True if the attributes are loaded correctly. False if the attribute file loading failed.

properties.name: Angle
properties.summary: Gets or sets the angle of the level mark, in degrees.

properties.name: ArrowHead
properties.summary: Gets or sets the arrow attributes for the level mark.

properties.name: Font
properties.summary: Gets or sets the font of the level mark text.

properties.name: Frame
properties.summary: Gets or sets the frame attributes for the level mark.

properties.name: PlacingAttributes
properties.summary: Gets or sets the placing attributes that the object should use. Using these you can specify whether the object is automatically arranged in the drawing or not.

properties.name: Postfix
properties.summary: Gets or sets text after the level value.

properties.name: Prefix
properties.summary: Gets or sets the text before the level value.

properties.name: TextHidden
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the numeric values are visible or hidden.

properties.name: TransparentBackground
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the transparency of the background of the level mark text is enabled.

properties.name: Unit
properties.summary: Gets or sets the unit attributes.

properties.name: UseGrouping
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to use different grouping options to represent the level mark dimensions.

properties.name: UsePositiveSignForPositiveLevels
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether a + character in front of positive level value.
